name: Baked Potato
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Wash and dry the potatoes.
3. Cut each potato into 4 slices, stopping about three-quarters of the way through the thickness.
4. Slice the onion into 1/4 inch slices, then cut those in half.
5. Place the onion slices inside the potato slices.
6. Rub the potatoes with butter.
7. Wrap the potatoes tightly in tin foil.
8. Cook for one hour.
